title: Spatial Rules
description: Design intent and spatial rule system for AI-assisted modeling.

design_intent.description: Plain-language description of the spatial goal.

hierarchy_rules.description: Rules that describe primary, secondary, and tertiary spatial hierarchy.

open_space_rules.description: Rules for plazas, courtyards, setbacks, voids, and public space.

mobility_rules.description: Rules for roads, pedestrian paths, TOD logic, and access.

landscape_rules.description: Rules for landscape corridors, green pockets, water, and planting logic.

notes.description: Human notes about unresolved rule decisions.

applies_to.description: Optional parcel IDs or group IDs affected by this rule.
